jurisdictional_context: Mexico is among the highest-volume PA-clinical jurisdictions in LATAM and the only one with a layered apex-court doctrinal record. Key anchors: (1) SCJN Accion de Inconstitucionalidad 11/2016 (Oaxaca) - Pleno resolved Oct 2017, DOF 16 May 2018, invalidated AUTOMATICITY of suspension/perdida de patria potestad attached to alienacion parental in Oaxaca Codigo Civil arts 336 Bis B, 429 Bis A, 459 fraccion IV (Decreto 1380); did NOT strike down the figura of AP in toto. (2) CDMX Codigo Civil art 323 Septimus - codified AP via ALDF 9 May 2014, DEROGATED 14 July 2017 (ALDF unanimous 36-0) in force 4 August 2017 - NOT 2021 as is frequently mis-stated. (3) State-level variation: AP remains codified in Estado de Mexico, Aguascalientes, Coahuila, Hidalgo, Queretaro, Puebla. (4) SCJN Protocolo para Juzgar con Perspectiva de Infancia y Adolescencia (Nov 2021) is procedural anchor. (5) CNDH 2011 Alienacion Parental 317pp 2nd ed is the principal mixed-positions institutional volume. (6) CDHCM 2015 Alienacion parental + 2017 derogation celebration + Amicus Curiae Amparo Directo 14/2020 SCJN are the clearest critique-side institutional voices. (7) AMPFS - Asociacion Mexicana de Padres de Familia Separados (founded Oct 2002) is the recognition-camp institutional anchor; Mendoza-Amaro / GARI-PA Hispanic chapter / PASG is the clinical-network anchor. (8) Sociedad Mexicana de Psicologia has issued NO public PA-specific institutional position - the single most important negative finding. Peritos psicologos forenses adscritos a juzgados familiares of CDMX/Edomex/Jalisco/Nuevo Leon operate via state TSJ peritaje circuits without national-society institutional cover. Cedula profesional issued by Direccion General de Profesiones SEP - BUSCATEC https://www.cedulaprofesional.sep.gob.mx/

user_brief_corrections.scjn_adr_2424_2014: Specific expediente 2424/2014 is no se ha podido verificar publicamente in primary SCJN engroses retrievable. Substitute: AI 11/2016 (Oaxaca), ADR 3859/2014 (Min Pte Zaldivar - violencia familiar framing), ADR 2710/2017 (modificacion de guarda y custodia por impedir convivencias).
user_brief_corrections.cdmx_323_septimus_repeal_date: Was DEROGATED 14 July 2017 in force 4 August 2017 - NOT nearly-repealed 2021. Post-2017 controversies are RE-INTRODUCTION attempts.
user_brief_corrections.eduardo_carrasco_garcia: No primary source verifies an Editorial Trillas Mexico textbook by this author. Most likely intended reference is Nelson Zicavo Crianza Compartida (Editorial Trillas, Mexico, ISBN 978-607-17-0661-4).
user_brief_corrections.federacion_mexicana_FEM: No public organisation matching Federacion Mexicana de Especialistas y Estudiosos de las Familias FEM is verifiable. The retrievable federation is Federacion Mexicana de Especialistas y Residentes en Medicina Familiar - medicina familiar, not psicologia familiar.

entries.name: Alejandro Heredia Avila (AMPFS Director General)
entries.credentials: Practitioner-advocate, not credentialed clinician of record
entries.entidad_federativa: CDMX + Estado de Mexico + Jalisco delegations

entries.name: Nelson Zicavo Martinez
entries.cedula_profesional: Chile-based; published through Mexican publisher Editorial Trillas
publications: Crianza Compartida. Sindrome de Alienacion Parental, Padrectomia, los Derechos de los Hijos ante la Separacion de los Padres (Editorial Trillas Mexico, ISBN 978-607-17-0661-4)

Author personally outside Mexico but functionally indistinguishable in Mexican PA reading list. The most likely intended referent of the brief's Eduardo Carrasco Garcia Trillas-textbook query.

Condiciones de los y las academicas de la FES Iztacala. Un analisis cualitativo (co-author M.A. Dorantes Gomez)
entries.contact: Via FES Iztacala Division de Investigacion y Posgrado
entries.verification_notes: Confirmed UNAM faculty; PA-specific publication confirmed via CNDH 2011 volume + Entre Hombres MX podcast Ep 183. Most-cited UNAM voice in recognition camp; structurally unusual placement (academic-feminism circuit + recognition-side AP framing).

entries.name: Patricia Trujano Ruiz
entries.credentials: Doctora en Psicologia; profesora titular FES Iztacala UNAM Carrera de Psicologia + Posgrado
publications: Violencia bidireccional y varones maltratados. Estudio en una muestra mexicana (Revista Latinoamericana de Medicina Conductual Vol 3 No 2, 2013)

Varones victimas de violencia domestica: un estudio exploratorio acerca de su percepcion y aceptacion (Redalyc)

Stance verified-by-line-of-work, not single AP paper. SAME FES as Torres Velazquez but opposite side of AP-clinical question.

Coordinator Programa Feminismo en Investigacion CEIICH 2007-2011; Seminario Feminismos en America Latina 2009-2011

Positioned by institutional-lineage + research-line - academic-feminism / CEIICH circuit from which Mexican critique-of-SAP discourse is generated. Strong UNAM faculty verification; weaker direct-AP-publication anchor.

Continuous coverage AI 11/2016 + CDMX 323 Septimus derogation process
entries.verification_notes: Institutional-press entry, not clinician. Included because Mexican PA-critique discourse cannot be source-mapped without it. Functional equivalent of Spain Publico / Brazil Conjur coverage circuit.

entries.name: Instituto Mexicano de la Pareja (IMP)
entries.credentials: Professional psicoterapia institute - Lic Psicologia Clinica, Maestria en Psicoterapia de Pareja e Individual, diplomados
publications: IMP institutional curriculum (psicoterapia de pareja + familiar sistemica)
entries.verification_notes: No formal IMP institutional PA position publicly retrievable. Included as structural middle-camp institutional anchor by clinical-tradition lineage (terapia familiar sistemica).

entries.name: Mediacion Familiar institutional circuit (Centros Estatales de Mediacion / Centro de Justicia Alternativa TSJCDMX)

publications: Mediacion Familiar en Mexico. Avances en Justicia alternativa para conflictos familiares (Redalyc)
entries.verification_notes: Not single named clinician; included as procedural-middle institutional layer where AP allegations are most often deflected from peritaje toward mediacion familiar.

entries.name: Suprema Corte de Justicia de la Nacion (SCJN) - Pleno + Primera Sala + Direccion General de Derechos Humanos y Justicia Pluricultural

Amparo Directo en Revision 3859/2014 (Min Pte Zaldivar) - violencia familiar framing
Amparo Directo en Revision 2710/2017 - modificacion de guarda y custodia por impedir convivencias
Tesis 2015415 alienacion parental
Protocolo para Juzgar con Perspectiva de Infancia y Adolescencia (Nov 2021)

entries.verification_notes: Mexican institutional doctrinal anchor cited by BOTH camps. AI 11/2016 invalidated automaticity of suspension/perdida de patria potestad - did NOT strike down figura of AP in toto. ADR 2424/2014 referenced in user-brief is no se ha podido verificar publicamente as primary source; use ADR 3859/2014 + ADR 2710/2017 as safer anchors.

entries.name: Comision Nacional de los Derechos Humanos (CNDH)
publications: Alienacion Parental (2011, 2a ed expandida) 317pp - multi-author mixed-positions institutional volume
Programa Ninez y Familia
Discussion roundtables on parental alienation + vicarious violence (post-2021)
entries.verification_notes: The CNDH 2011 volume is the single most operationally-important Mexican institutional reference - both camps cite it.

entries.verification_notes: Clearest critique-side institutional voice in Mexico. Verbatim Spanish: la mal denominada figura de alienacion parental.

entries.credentials: Legislative-research centre Congreso CDMX II Legislatura

entries.name: Cedula Profesional / Direccion General de Profesiones (DGP-SEP) - BUSCATEC
entries.credentials: Federal credentialing registry for all Mexican psicologos
entries.verification_notes: Cedula numbers generally NOT publicly displayed on practitioner sites; verification requires direct BUSCATEC lookup before formal outreach.

entries.name: Sociedad Mexicana de Psicologia (SMP) / Federacion Mexicana de Psicologia
publications: Codigo Etico del Psicologo (multiple editions) - does not address AP specifically
entries.verification_notes: THE SINGLE MOST IMPORTANT NEGATIVE FINDING. Unlike Brazil CFP NT 4/2022 or Colombia COLPSIC 2023 Posicion Gremial, the Sociedad Mexicana de Psicologia has issued NO public institutional position on alienacion parental. Structural reason individual Mexican psicologos in either camp operate without institutional cover.

excluded_entries.reason: No se ha podido verificar publicamente a named PA-specific clinical guia from any of these three federal bodies.

structural_findings: SINGLE BIGGEST: Mexico has the most layered apex-court doctrinal record on AP of any LATAM jurisdiction - and the only example of a jurisdiction that codified AP in capital civil code (CDMX 2014), then derogated it (2017), then preserved the figura at federal level while invalidating its automatic-consequence rule (SCJN AI 11/2016 Oaxaca, ruled 2017, DOF 2018). The result is a uniquely fragmented landscape where individual clinicians on both sides operate without institutional psicologia-profession cover. The Sociedad Mexicana de Psicologia has issued no PA-specific institutional position - the single most consequential negative finding.

Recognition camp is institutionally healthier at the clinical-author level (Mendoza-Amaro + AMPFS + GARI-PA triad); critique camp is institutionally healthier at the human-rights-institution level (CDHCM + CELIG + cimacnoticias triad) but thin on named individual clinician-authors with primary PA publications.
Two FES Iztacala figures (Laura Evelia Torres = recognition; Patricia Trujano = critique-adjacent) illustrate the same-campus opposite-sides pattern.
CDMX 323 Septimus chronology was significantly mis-dated in briefing-set assumption - derogation was 2017 not 2021. Post-2017 reform attempts are RE-INTRODUCTION attempts.
AI 11/2016 (Oaxaca) is the load-bearing apex-court anchor for Mexican PA jurisprudence, not ADR 2424/2014 (which is not independently verifiable).

State-code variation matters operationally more than federal doctrine - same perito working custodia case will encounter AP as tipificable category in Toluca and not in CDMX across the same Valle de Mexico metropolis.
CNDH 2011 Alienacion Parental (2nd ed, 317pp) is the single most operationally-useful Mexican institutional reference - explicitly mixed-positions, used by both camps.
